objective: Status handoff from ubuntu worker: autopilot service was moved off the dirty dev checkout and now runs from /home/larieladmin/mide-worker-service. The worker script was hardened to reset generated state files, use pull --rebase, and retry pushes. MTASK-0120 was diagnosed and fixed: stale ngrok agents and alternate local admin ports were blocking tunnel discovery. The executor was updated to clear stale local ngrok tunnels across ports 4040-4045 and discover the 5555 cockpit tunnel across those ports. Cockpit public URL is now https://jawed-lapel-dispersed.ngrok-free.dev and /api/status/runtime returns HTTP 200 through the tunnel.
title: Ubuntu worker handoff: autopilot stabilized and MTASK-0120 completed
description: Completed on Ubuntu: systemd worker service now runs from the dedicated clean clone instead of /Documents/itheia-llm/MIDE, out-of-repo logging is enabled, automatic polling resumed, and MTASK-0120 now passes with cockpit.public_url written to pilot_v1/config/worker1_services.json. Relevant result: MTASK-0120 final_status=ALL_CHECKS_PASSED. Relevant follow-up for main operator: consume the new cockpit public URL, and note that the MTASK-0120 executor fix was committed upstream so future retries use the hardened ngrok detection path.
